headline: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
summary: Here's your compressed story:. Google Workspace apps are rolling out redesigned icons.. The new look features a modern gradient design with fading shades..

headline: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
summary: Sony hikes PlayStation Plus prices.**. & 3-month subscriptions cost more in select regions, effective May 20.**. New rates: $10.99 (1-month) and $27.99 (3-month) in the US.**.

headline: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Here are your compressed bullet points:. Elon Musk and Sam Altman are in court over the future of OpenAI.. Musk sued OpenAI, alleging it abandoned its "AI for humanity" mission for profit..

headline: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
summary: The Verge's 2026 College Graduation Gift Guide.. Help grads tackle new jobs, apartments & responsibilities.. Find the perfect gift for their next big step..

headline: Linus Torvalds says Linux security list is becoming ‘unmanageable’ due to AI bug reports
summary: Here are your compressed bullet points:. Linus Torvalds warns: Linux security list is now "unmanageable.". Blames a "flood of AI bug reports" for the chaos..

headline: Exclusive: Jonah Peretti explains why he sold BuzzFeed
summary: BuzzFeed CEO Jonah Peretti sells majority stake in the company.. Byron Allen (Weather Channel owner) acquires 52% for $120 million.. Peretti steps down as CEO, explains the sale in an exclusive interview..
